tuning_note: Uses exact request.use_case from artifacts/brand-project-exact-raw-paragraph.json (line breaks preserved in JSON string).

projection_env.note: Next.js server must be restarted to pick up .env.local changes; values below are what this repo’s .env.local defines for projection.

request.use_case:
now le rerun all the test to see if everything is working well , alos if the user do the dynamic json 


for example like  this peekabo 

Install
Two ways: native app/CLI via Homebrew, or MCP server via npm. Both expose the same toolset.

Homebrew
MCP (npm)
npx -y @steipete/peekaboo

Requires macOS Screen Recording + Accessibility permissions. Grant guide.

peekaboo "Open Safari, go to github.com, and search for Peekaboo"

brand_projection.typography_rules: Use SF Pro Display for headings and SF Pro Text for body text with clear hierarchy.
brand_projection.core_slogan: Discover the innovative world of Apple and shop everything iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Mac, and Apple TV, plus explore accessories, entertainment, and expert device support
brand_projection.imagen_style_conditioning: Minimalist premium visual style with clean surfaces, balanced contrast, and modern product focus. Maintain sharp lighting, precise composition, and restrained color accents.
